title: Sodexo India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Sodexo India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Sodexo India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sodexo India:
Sodexo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
